title: Tooniverse Texture Pack 256x
body: ![Tooniverse Texture Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db3edab3969c2c1868746654e3c06f33bfce12ab.png) ## [32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooniverse-32x) - [64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooniverse-64x) - [128x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooniverse-128x) - 256x ### Tooniverse is a **complete** texture replacement for Minecraft Java Edition! It's designed to look clean, but with crisp HD textures and a unique colour palette that makes default Minecraft look dull! The cartoon style is consistent throughout the pack to get you truly immersed in a cartoon world Also, expect much attention to detail with many 3D models and lots of random texture variations! **Use with [Optifine](https://optifine.net/) for even more features like custom colours and skyboxes** **Also compatible with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**\ (Using with Sodium may give an error message since Sodium's renderer does not support built-in shaders. Tooniverse Texture Pack will still run fine without the built-in shaders, or you could try [Iris shaders](https://www.irisshaders.dev/) instead) ### Features - 3,000+ textures! - Mobs, Items, Armour, Particles, GUIs... everything is textured! - Regular updates - 3D models - Built-in shaders - 256x resolution ### License You may: - Use this resource pack for personal use - Share videos of this resource pack with attribution to Crafty Fox Digital and a link to this page in the description - Put the Modrinth download link in your server.properties file to include Tooniverse with your Minecraft server You MAY NOT: - Share or redistribute this resource pack, or any part of it - Use any part of this resource pack in other projects (except for personal use only) © Crafty Fox Digital 2025 - All Rights Reserved # Coming soon to Bedrock edition! ### [Customise with optional Add-ons](https://tooniverse.gg/addons) ### [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/gdzqxGShDg)
